eliminations: Elimination with Ally on Low HP
interactions: Anran : *aggressive sneeze* Whew, I think my allergies are acting up. Jetpack Cat : *innocent meows* Anran : Ugh, no wonder.

Cassidy : Now, if I give you this treat, you better not tell your ma, ya hear? Jetpack Cat : Meow meow! Brigitte : Cassidy, you’re gonna teach her to beg! Aww, but she has been so good lately, hasn’t she?
Juno : I have heard that cats can be quite temperamental, but Fika seems very friendly! Brigitte : They aren't always the nicest, I think she just really likes you. Jetpack Cat : Meow!
Reinhardt : A cat? In a jetpack?! *laugh* You’ve got to be catting me! *laugh* Jetpack Cat : *confused meows* Wuyang : Shouldn't it be “‘kitten’ me”? Brigitte : Ugh... trust me. I've already tried.

Sojourn : Brigitte, you’re one of my best agents. So I’ll give you one chance to explain why you put a cat in a jetpack. Brigitte : I know it seems crazy, but she can help! Can’t you, Fika? Good girl! Jetpack Cat : *happy meows* Sojourn : Ugh, I should’ve stayed retired…
Jetpack Cat : *questioning meows* Juno : Are you speaking to me? Jetpack Cat : *affirmative meows* Juno : Hm… perhaps I should prioritize “cat” on my list of languages to learn.
Kiriko : You’re so cute, I could just squish you to bits! Jetpack Cat : *angry hiss* Kiriko : Aww, don’t worry! I’m just pulling your tail. Jetpack Cat : *angry meow*
Lúcio : So, I’m trying to ask everybody this. What’s your favorite animal? Jetpack Cat : *meows* Lúcio : Uh… yeah, I can see it!
Mauga : How about you fly me up and I’ll make it rain fire! Jetpack Cat : *doubtful meows*

Reinhardt : A cat? In a jetpack?! *laugh* You’ve got to be catting me! *laugh* Jetpack Cat : *confused meows* Mercy : Reinhardt… I do believe it’s “‘kitten’ me”. Reinhardt : Don’t be ridiculous. She’s not a baby!
Mizuki: Ah, if only you were a black cat... you could ward off evil. Jetpack Cat: *panicked meows* Mizuki: Sorry, jeez! You're fine the way you are, OK? Jetpack Cat: *understanding meows*
Moira : Intelligent, adaptable... You have the makings of a perfect test subject. Jetpack Cat : *grumbling meows* Moira : Hm. Though an added dose of obedience would be appreciated...
Ramattra : How delighful to see human arrogance contradicted. By a cat, no less. Jetpack Cat: *proud purring*
Reinhardt : The battle ahead will be perilous. Sharpen those claws, Fika! Jetpack Cat : *contented meows* Reinhardt : Or perhaps our enemies will change their ways when they see how cute you are.

Sojourn : You'd better stay out of trouble out there. Understand, recruit? Jetpack Cat : *innocent meows* Sojourn : And I'll know if you've been sneaking treats between missions! Jetpack Cat : *disappointed meows*

Winston : Fika, were you playing on my desk agin? You accidentally tripped my security systems! Jetpack Cat : *innocent meows* Winston : *chuckle* Aww, it's okay. I'll find you something else to play with.

Winston : You remind me of an old friend from the Lunar Colony. Jetpack Cat : *questioning meows* Winston : You're both smart, and cute, and love finding trouble! I hope I can introduce you to him one day.
Wuyang : Hey little guy, c’mere! Psst psst psst. Jetpack Cat : *hisses* Wuyang : Ack! Uh… sorry.
